remarks: Experience modern living at the highly sought-after Eastside Commons (built in 2008). This bright, open-concept 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom condo features a chef's kitchen complete with a center island, granite countertops, a gas range, and stainless steel appliances. The spacious primary suite boasts a large walk-in closet and an en-suite bathroom, while the second bedroom also features its own walk-in closet and is nearly equal in size. Enjoy your morning coffee on the private balcony overlooking the peaceful courtyard. Rent includes fantastic building amenities at no additional cost, including a fully equipped fitness center, a courtyard grilling area, and concierge service for package deliveries during business hours. Two garage parking spaces are available (one reserved and one floating if needed). Located in an unbeatable commuter location, you're just minutes from downtown Stamford, I-95, and the Metro-North train station, making for an easy commute to New York City.
